## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Node backend
- [ ] Java runtime
- [ ] Docker or build
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Branding

## Verification

List the checks that were actually completed.

## Remaining issues

List any known blocker or unverified integration.

## Safety

- [ ] No secret or local machine path is included
- [ ] Existing user changes were not overwritten
- [ ] The change is on a branch, not directly on main
